review_text: ชาไทยที่นี่อร่อยมากค่ะ หอมกลิ่นเครื่องเทศ หวานกำลังดี ใส่นมสดเยอะ ทำให้รสชาติกลมกล่อม สั่งทุกครั้งที่มา ไม่เคยผิดหวัง
The Nitro Flat White here is a game-changer! The cascading effect is mesmerizing and the smooth, velvety texture is perfect. Just wish it was a bit stronger.
แมงโก้สมูทตี้รสชาติธรรมดามาก มะม่วงไม่หวาน น้ำแข็งเยอะเกินไป เหมือนกินน้ำแข็งบด เสียดายเงิน
Best croissant in town! Perfectly flaky and buttery layers, with a beautiful golden-brown color. Still warm when served. Worth every penny!
Terrible bubble tea experience. The pearls were too hard, the tea was watery, and the sweetness level was way off. Save your money and go elsewhere.
The muffin was absolutely delicious! It was moist, fluffy, and had the perfect amount of sweetness. I highly recommend it!
The Iced Americano was too bitter for my taste. It felt like it was over-extracted. I wouldn’t order it again.
This smoothie was so refreshing! The watermelon flavor was natural and not overly sweet. Perfect for a hot day.
The croissant was stale and dry. It tasted like it had been sitting out for hours. Very disappointing.
The blueberry muffin was absolutely delicious! Moist, flavorful, and packed with blueberries.  Perfect with my latte.
The donut was okay.  A little dry, but the glaze was good.  I've had better donuts though.
The ham and cheese sandwich was surprisingly good.  Fresh bread and generous fillings.  A good quick lunch option.

I love the croissants here! Flaky, buttery, and perfectly baked.  Just like in Paris!  อร่อยมากค่ะ (Very delicious!)
The chocolate chip cookie was warm and chewy. Just the right amount of sweetness.  A perfect afternoon treat.
The Americano was decent. Strong, as it should be, but nothing particularly special.
Great cappuccino! The foam was perfect and the coffee had a rich flavor. Will definitely order again.
Perfect espresso! Strong, rich, and with a beautiful crema.  Just what I needed.
The mocha was very good.  Rich chocolate flavor and the coffee was strong enough to balance it out.  A little too sweet for some, perhaps.
My latte was fine.  Nothing to complain about, but nothing to rave about either.  Standard latte.
The iced latte was refreshing and flavorful.  Perfect for a hot day.
The iced Americano was too bitter for my taste.  I added some sugar, but it didn't help much.
The nitro flat white was amazing!  So smooth and creamy without any milk.  A must-try!
The mocha cold brew was delicious.  Smooth, chocolatey, and not too sweet.  A great pick-me-up.
The watermelon smoothie was so refreshing! Perfect for a hot day.  หวานชื่นใจ (Sweet and refreshing)!
The kiwi smoothie was okay.  A bit tart, but I like tart flavors.  Could have been a little sweeter.
The mango smoothie was delicious!  Sweet and creamy.  I'd definitely order it again.
The strawberry smoothie was good.  Tasted fresh and had a nice strawberry flavor.
The black tea was standard.  Nothing special, but it did the job.
